title: lastrea quelpartensis
intro: Lastrea quelpartensis, also known as Quelpart fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lastrea quelpartensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
